Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: mirrors by form [300165317], mirrors [300037682], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: equipment for grooming, hygiene and health care [300236656], personal equipment [300238982], equipment by context [300239170], equipment [300122241], Tools and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300022238], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Small mirrors set in frames which have projecting handles, used mainly at a dressing table.
Úsese para espejos pequeños colocados en marcos que tienen mangos sobresalientes, usados principalmente en un tocador.
Wordt gebruikt voor kleine, ingelijste spiegels met uitstekende handvatten. Ze worden voornamelijk bij de toilettafel gebruikt.
備有突出式把手及框架的小鏡子，多用於梳妝台上。
Kleiner Spiegel, in einem Rahmen gefasst, mit einem überstehenden Griff, der hauptsächlich an einem Toilettentisch genutzt wird.
